description: Nick and Jacob from the Solana Foundation discuss updates in the Solana ecosystem, including the Coliseum hackathon, improvements to transaction processing, and the release of Web3JS Tech Preview number two.
topic_summary: Updates on the Solana ecosystem including the Coliseum hackathon [t=15:28], transaction processing improvements [t=148:73], and Web3JS Tech Preview number two [t=301:85].
